LAYER 1 — CLIENT PORTALS · REACT 18 · VITE 4 · REACT ROUTER v7
LAYER 2 — FASTAPI BACKEND · PYTHON 3.12 · PYDANTIC v2 · UVICORN
main.py · Auto-migration via Base.metadata.create_all() · CORS · JWT-ready
Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine) · ALTER TABLE IF NOT EXISTS migrations · Relationship cascade
id · session_id (FK) · student_id (FK) · reason · new_date · status
⚠ Test Mode: When RAZORPAY_KEY_ID='rzp_test_placeholder' — simulates payment with 1.2s delay, skips HMAC verification
Supported: UPI · Cards · Net Banking · Wallets · EMI
Auth: google.oauth2.service_account · Credentials: Service Account JSON · Scope: spreadsheets
localStorage.setItem('student', JSON.stringify(data)) → student_id used in all subsequent API calls
OTP stored in students.otp column → verified server-side → cleared after success
Grade+course filter → package list → Razorpay order → HMAC verify → Invoice created → StudentPackage activated
Test mode: RAZORPAY_KEY_ID='rzp_test_placeholder' → simulates with 1.2s delay
sessions_used incremented on each attendance mark → triggers renewal reminder when sessions_used ≥ 80%
Makeup sessions tracked separately → makeup_used counter → reschedule_requests linked
React 18 + Vite 4 · React Router v7 · Tailwind CSS v3.4
lucide-react v0.259.0 · date-fns v4 · Razorpay checkout.js (CDN)
Pure SVG Charts (no library) · localStorage Auth · Mobile-First
Design: #463a7a purple theme · rounded-[32px] · Outfit font
Auto-migration: Base.metadata.create_all() + ALTER IF NOT EXISTS
JSON columns for grade/course arrays (Text + json.loads)
Relationship cascades · FK constraints · Index on id/phone
